ui.intel_no_ships: There are currently no ships equipped with shipboard AI systems.
ui.intel_missing_ship: The target ship does not exist and may have left the fleet.
ui.intel_missing_no_ai: The ship does not have a shipboard AI system installed.
ui.intel_missing_data: This ship has not initialized shipboard AI data.
ui.intel_missing_type: Shipboard AI type configuration is missing.
ui.intel_available_skill_empty: There are currently no skills to learn.
ui.intel_available_elite_empty: There are currently no elite skills available.
ui.intel_available_aux_heading: Auxiliary effects can be learned ({count} times remaining)
ui.intel_available_aux_empty: There are currently no learning assistance effects.
ui.intel_msg_rename_success: Shipboard AI names have been updated

Moci_Aux_HardFluxVent.name: Hard flux venting
Moci_Aux_HardFluxVent.description: Hard flux can be passively vented +{value}%

Moci_CombatSquadIntel.fleet_no_manageable: There are currently no ships to manage.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.fleet_hint: Ships with {mod1} or {mod2} installed will appear here.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.squad_empty: There are currently no pilots in this formation.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.upgrade_prompt_elite: Pilot {name} becomes elite! Please select the skills you want to elite:
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.upgrade_prompt_learn: Pilot {name} upgraded! Please select the skill you want to learn:
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.upgrade_elite_alt: Or choose to elite your existing skills:
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.upgrade_no_elite: This pilot currently has no elite skills
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.detail_missing_ship: The target ship does not exist and may have left the fleet.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.detail_no_squad: This ship does not currently have a squad.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.detail_no_squad_hint: Please install {mod} and assign non-default officers first, then complete squad initialization during the campaign.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_concept_1: - {system} is a pilot formation management system that allows players to configure wingman formations for ships with {mod} installed.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_concept_2: - The formation consists of one {leader} and up to {count} {wingman}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_concept_3: - {wingman} will automatically follow {leader} in battle and provide {support1} and {support2}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_rules_1: - The leader aircraft must have {mod} ship plug installed
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_rules_2: - The leader aircraft must have {captain} as captain
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_rules_3: - The formation will automatically follow {leader} to move and fight
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_rules_4: - {wingman} does not consume {dp} and {supplies} in combat
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_select_4: - {wingman} cannot be the {leader} of another formation
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_select_6: - {wingman} must be a supported manufacturer type
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_custom_ship_1: - Can {assign} specific ships to each pilot
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_custom_ship_2: - Assigned ships will maintain full {fit} (weapons, ship inserts, modifications, etc.)
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_custom_ship_3: - The assigned ship will {remove} from the fleet, and when a new ship is assigned, the old ship will {return}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_custom_ship_4: - If the wingman's DP exceeds the captain's chance, it will {fail} during the battle.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_pilot_1: - You can modify the pilot's {name} and {callsign}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_pilot_5: - Pilot experience will be {auto_exp} in battle
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_1: - Click {portrait} in the formation list to enter formation details
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_2: - Click {ai_portrait} to enter shipboard AI details
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_3: - Click {assign_ship} to select a custom ship for the pilot
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_4: - Click {change_portrait} to choose a new avatar for the pilot
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_5: - Modify pilot {name} and {callsign} using input boxes and buttons
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_6: - When the pilot experience is enough, click {upgrade} to learn new skills
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_ops_7: - When you have elite points, click {elite} to upgrade your skill level
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_notes_1: - Formation data will be {autosave}, no manual operation required
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_notes_2: - The wingman will {autodeploy} during the battle without player intervention.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_notes_3: - Assigned custom ships will {autoreturn} to the fleet after the battle
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.help_notes_4: - If the squadron's leader aircraft is destroyed in battle, the squad will start a {retreat}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.msg_assign_fail: Ship assignment failed and may not meet the conditions
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.msg_restore_success: {pilot}'s ships have been restored to default configuration and custom ships have been returned to the fleet
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.msg_learn_skill_success: Pilot {pilot} (callsign: {callsign}) upgraded and learned the skill: {skill}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.msg_elite_skill_success: Pilot {pilot} (callsign: {callsign}) has upgraded and elite skills: {skill}
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.msg_missing_pilot: Error: Unable to find pilot information
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.confirm_reset: Confirm to reset all configurations? This operation will clear all pilot data!
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.ship_select_empty: There are no ships to assign. The ship must be a frigate and deployed at a lower point than the leader's aircraft.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_intro: When the battle begins, a dedicated formation is summoned to support the battle. Formation member %s.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_retreat: When a formation member's CR is lower than %s or the mothership is destroyed, the corresponding member will begin to retreat.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_unapplicable_need_captain: Need to install the captain's ship plug
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_disabled: The pilot system is currently disabled. CombatSquad wingman will not have its own pilot.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_enable_hint: The pilot system can be enabled via LunaLib settings or configuration code.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_mode_dynamic_line1: - Pilots gain experience and level up during battles
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_mode_dynamic_line2: - Commander skills affect the performance of the entire formation
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_need_commander: A commander needs to be assigned to a ship in order to create a pilot formation.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_squad_unformed: The pilot formation has not yet been established. It will be created automatically when the battle starts.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_fixed_hint: Using a fixed officer configuration, CombatSquad wingmen will be equipped with standard officers.
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_explain_1: - Pilot mode can be switched in LunaLib settings
Moci_CombatSquadIntel.hullmod_ui_explain_2: - For detailed formation management, please see %s
